name: community namespacing: a rule in _community/acme/ pre-namespaced as "contoso/foo" (wrong prefix) is rejected
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: a
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: https://a.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules:
  - {id: contoso/foo, name: foo, description: x, detector: x}
' > tree/_community/acme/x.yaml
